steps.t: Maethad is north and east of Gabilshathûr. Hwati has instructed you to enter the centre of Maethad and use the Ushum-ghâsh to draw Khurrákh forth.
Hwati is back at Gabilshathûr, west and south of Maethad. Having defeated Khurrákh, you should return to Hwati and tell him the tale of your deeds.
